g.text: Continue until all probation customers processed
Uses system parameters for progress tracking
System parameters updated to latest position
- Continues until all probation customers processed
- No batch chunking (processes all at once)
- Can upgrade, downgrade, or maintain category
- DailyProblem: Recursive, queue-based, with external push
- Complete probation if end date reached
- Set to LastCustID from SP output
- Set to LastCategoryID from SP output
- true: CustProbations has data (more to process)
